blocks.text: 2. Perform input checks and if all is normal and there is an abnormality in the system Replace the combination meter

rows.text: inspection terminal
Wiring color
Measuring conditions
result
Inspection items in case of abnormality
black
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G402) Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
yellow
24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Blown No. A14 (10A) fuse in relay box Blown No. D1 (15A) fuse in sub fuse/relay box Fuse Box Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
purple
Turn ignition to ON mode
Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Blown No. D4 (7.5A) fuse in sub fuse/relay box Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
weak matcha
Parking brake Switch ON (depress the pedal)
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Parking brake switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
tea
Brake fluid level switch ON (float down)
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G201) Brake fluid level switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
new leaves
ECON switch ON
Continuity must exist between the inspection terminal and body ground.
Grounding failure (G402) ECON Switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
green
Turn ignition to ON mode Turn Signal Switch R. Position
R. Turn Signal Battery voltage present between inspection terminal and body ground when indicator is lit
MICU Turn Signal Switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
green
Turn ignition to ON mode Turn Signal Switch L. Position
L. Turn Signal Battery voltage present between inspection terminal and body ground when indicator is lit
MICU Turn Signal Switch Cord disconnection and terminal connection condition
